raw_text: Did anyone else hear that loud noise near 5th street? Sounded like a transformer blew.
WARNING: I just got an email from 'Bank of America' saying my account is locked and I need to click a link to verify my SSN. The email address is totally fake. Don't fall for it!
Alert: Excitel broadband just sent out a notice that their local database was breached. Change your WiFi router passwords if you use them!
Has anyone seen a golden retriever near the park? He slipped out of his collar this morning.

Hey neighbors, there are two guys walking around claiming to be from the city water department asking to come inside and test the sinks. The police just confirmed they are scammers trying to case houses.
Got a text from FedEx saying my package is delayed and I need to pay a $2 fee via the link attached. I'm not expecting any packages right now.
The pothole on Elm street is getting ridiculous. I almost popped a tire today. Who do we call to get this fixed?
Just a heads up, three cars were broken into on 3rd Avenue last night. Make sure you aren't leaving any bags or laptops visible on your seats!
I just received a very aggressive voicemail claiming to be from the IRS saying there's a warrant out for my arrest if I don't call back and provide my SSN immediately. Total scam.
Does anyone have a recommendation for a good plumber? The pipe under my kitchen sink is leaking everywhere.
